code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            if v > 0
              count = count + 1
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  println("positive=#{count}")
end
